title: Hunger
writer: Henning Carlsen, Knut Hamsun, Peter Seeberg
actors: Per Oscarsson, Gunnel Lindblom, Birgitte Federspiel
plot: In 1890, Pontus, the starving writer, wanders the streets of Christiania, in search of love and a chance to get his work published. All he meets is defeat and suffering while his sense of reality is withering. One moment his is de...
